title: Proofreaders and Copy Markers
description: Read transcript or proof type setup to detect and mark for correction any grammatical, typographical, or compositional errors. Excludes workers whose primary duty is editing copy. Includes proofreaders of braille.

tasks.text: Mark copy to indicate and correct errors in type, arrangement, grammar, punctuation, or spelling, using standard printers' marks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read corrected copies or proofs to ensure that all corrections have been made.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Correct or record omissions, errors, or inconsistencies found.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compare information or figures on one record against same data on other records, or with original copy, to detect errors.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Route proofs with marked corrections to authors, editors, typists, or typesetters for correction or reprinting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult reference books or secure aid of readers to check references with rules of grammar and composition.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with authors and editors regarding manuscript changes and suggestions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Archive documents, conduct research, and read copy, using the internet and various computer programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write original content, such as headlines, cutlines, captions, and cover copy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Typeset and measure dimensions, spacing, and positioning of page elements, such as copy and illustrations, to verify conformance to specifications, using printer's ruler or layout software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read proof sheets aloud, calling out punctuation marks and spelling unusual words and proper names.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
